Create an in-memory D85 multi-writer append log.

## Import

```ts
import { memoryMultiWriterAppendLog } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```

## Signature

```ts
function memoryMultiWriterAppendLog(prefix?: string): MultiWriterAppendLogStorageTier<T>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `prefix` | `string` | prefix value used by the helper. |

## Returns

A `MultiWriterAppendLogStorageTier<T>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { memoryMultiWriterAppendLog } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```

`packages/ts/src/storage/append-log.ts`
